scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.clean:all: node scripts/dev-local.mjs down 2>/dev/null || true; rm -rf node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules frontend/dist .dev-local frontend/.vite frontend/node_modules/.vite .turbo coverage backend/coverage frontend/coverage 2>/dev/null; find frontend -maxdepth 1 -name 'vite.config.js.timestamp-*.mjs' -delete 2>/dev/null; echo 'Nettoyage terminé. Puis: npm run setup — si le backend refuse de démarrer (better-sqlite3), voir docs/DEV-LOCAL-RESET.md'
